forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -22,13 +22,13 @@

 Magnifying glass ASCII art (7 lines tall):
 ```
-  .---.   
- /  O  \  
-|  ( )  | 
- \  O  /  
-  '---'   
-    |     
-    |___  
+  .---.
+ /  O  \
+|  ( )  |
+ \  O  /
+  '---'
+    |
+    |___
 ```
 Adjust to 7 lines. The word "CODE" follows on the right in ANSI Shadow block font.
 "CONTEXT" continues in the second block (5 lines).
